name: enrichProduct
label: Enrich Product
description: Extract structured product data from a URL using Schema.org + AI extraction. Cost: $0.02/call.

parameters.name: url
parameters.label: Product URL
parameters.help: The URL of the product page to extract data from

parameters.name: strict_confidence_threshold
parameters.label: Confidence Threshold
parameters.help: Fields below this confidence (0.0-1.0) will be scrubbed to null with explanation. Leave empty for all fields.

parameters.name: include_score
parameters.label: Include AgentReady Score
parameters.help: Include agent-readiness score (0-100) in the response
